Class Document

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.PObject
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.document.Document
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class Document extends PObject
JPA entity to represent a document.

peter
